prompt: Create a polished anime-style travel illustration set at Lake Akan, Akan-Mashu National Park, Hokkaido on a bright clear day. In the foreground, show exactly 4 people: 1 central young female tour guide with realistic squirrel ears, long flowing warm brown hair, decorative hair clips and dangling earrings, wearing an ornate navy-and-cream Ainu-inspired guide outfit with embroidered geometric trim, tassels, belt cords, and layered sleeves; and 3 tourists listening to her, including a young man in a brown baseball cap on the left, a seated or lower-positioned woman in a beige bucket hat in the center foreground, and a woman with a ponytail holding a pamphlet on the right. The guide stands confidently beside a wooden viewpoint sign, holding a blue travel brochure titled Lake Akan Guide Map while extending one arm toward the lake and mountains as if presenting the scenery. Include a wooden sign with Japanese and English text reading 阿寒摩周国立公園 / Akan-Mashu National Park / 阿寒湖 / Lake Akan. Behind them, depict a vivid blue lake with a sightseeing boat, forested green mountains, distant shoreline, railings, and a deep blue sky with wispy white clouds. Add exactly 18 translucent iridescent soap bubbles: 1 enormous squirrel-tail-shaped bubble curling behind the guide on the right, 2 large round bubbles floating high in the sky, 5 medium bubbles around her head and upper body, and 10 tiny bubbles scattered around her hair, sleeves, and waist. Use luminous rainbow reflections on the bubbles, crisp linework, cinematic composition, detailed fabric ornamentation, soft sunlight, high-resolution anime realism, cheerful tourism-poster atmosphere, and a whimsical magical guide concept.
